pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to enable compilation for JDK 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.1.9.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE, which is required for JDK 11 compatibility.
Add JAXB runtime dependency explicitly because it was removed from the JDK standard library in JDK 11.
Change the project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Update the Maven group ID to reflect the new JHipster sample application namespace.
Update the Maven artifact ID to reflect the new JHipster sample application name.
Import the JHipster dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions consistently.
Upgrade Hibernate version to 5.4.25.Final to match the Spring Boot 2.3 managed version.
Upgrade Liquibase version to 4.2.2 to match the Spring Boot 2.3 managed version.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.8.1 to ensure proper support for Java 11 language features.
Update Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support JUnit 5 and modern test execution.
Update Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support JUnit 5 and modern integration test execution.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to manage Node.js and npm versions for frontend build steps.
Add Jib Maven Plugin for containerizing the application without a Dockerfile.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin for code coverage reporting.
Update Sonar Maven Plugin to 3.7.0.1746 for modern static analysis integration.
Add Maven Checkstyle Plugin and Spring NoHttp Checkstyle for code quality enforcement.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate build information properties from Git metadata.
Add MapStruct dependency for type-safe bean mapping.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architecture testing.
Update Validation API to 2.0.1.Final to align with Jakarta EE / Java EE 8 standards.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to 3.0.0-M3 for build constraint enforcement.
Update Maven Resources Plugin to 3.2.0 for resource filtering and processing.
Update Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.2.0 for documentation generation.
Update Maven WAR Plugin to 3.3.1 for WAR packaging support (though packaging is now JAR).
Update Maven Clean Plugin to 3.1.0 for build cleanup.
Update Maven Eclipse Plugin to 2.10 for Eclipse IDE integration.
Update Maven IDEA Plugin to 2.2.1 for IntelliJ IDEA integration.
Add Properties Maven Plugin for property manipulation during build.
Add Lifecycle Mapping configuration for IDE compatibility.
Update Maven prerequisite version to 3.3.9 to ensure compatibility with newer plugin features.
Define Node.js and npm versions for frontend build consistency.
Explicitly set project source and reporting encoding to UTF-8.
Add JVM argument line for security and memory settings during tests.
Configure M2E APT activation for Eclipse annotation processing.
Add empty profile properties for no-liquibase, api-docs, and tls profiles.
Add empty repositories section with JHipster needle for custom repository injection.
Add empty pluginRepositories section with JHipster needle for custom plugin repository injection.
Add comment placeholder for distribution management configuration.
Add comment placeholder for custom Maven properties injection.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location to use HTTPS.
Add project name property for better identification.
Define test result directory property for organized test output.
Define Maven build timestamp format for consistent build metadata.
Define Maven compiler source and target properties linked to Java version.
Define JaCoCo report folder and file properties for unit and integration tests.
Define JUnit report folder properties for unit and integration tests.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and remove redundant global settings.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings into specific glob patterns and removed the global indent block.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Update file patterns in .editorconfig to explicitly target web and config files with 2-space indentation.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Replaced generic or missing patterns with [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and set indent_size = 2.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with a detailed list including `* text=auto`, specific CRLF/LF rules for scripts, and binary definitions for archives, fonts, and media.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with Java 11 support.
Change the application package name and base name to match the new sample application identity.
Switch authentication mechanism from cookie-based to JWT.
Migrate frontend build tool from Grunt to npm and framework to AngularX.
Normalize configuration values from string representations to boolean types.
Include Gatling and Protractor in the test frameworks configuration.
Define the initial set of entities for the application.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the outdated README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old markdown content with new sections for Development, Building, Testing, and Docker.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and license fields to reflect the new application identity and private status.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for backend testing, CI/CD pipelines, and Docker management.
Add scripts for building Java artifacts (jar/war) and Docker images using Maven.
Add scripts for Angular development server, production builds, and testing using ng cli.
Add scripts for linting and formatting code using ESLint and Prettier.
Add scripts for running end-to-end tests using Protractor and managing WebDrivers.
Add a config section to define default backend port, environment, and packaging type.
Add core Angular framework dependencies required for the application to run.
Add UI-related Angular dependencies like Bootstrap, FontAwesome, and NgBootstrap.
Add utility Angular dependencies for localization, translation, and state management.
Add runtime libraries for date handling, reactive programming, and API documentation.
Add Angular CLI and compiler dependencies required for building and serving the app.
Add testing framework dependencies including Jest, Chai, and Selenium types.
Add linting and formatting tool dependencies for TypeScript and Angular.
Add custom webpack builders and OpenAPI generator CLI for build process customization.
Remove obsolete Grunt build tool and its plugins which are no longer used.
Remove obsolete Karma test runner and its launchers/preprocessors.
Remove obsolete Bower package manager dependency.
Remove the old generator-jhipster dependency which is no longer needed in the project.
Remove obsolete utility libraries like lodash and zeparser.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster branded banner including Spring Boot version and URL.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced old ASCII art with new block-based JHipster logo and metadata lines.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy JHipster format to standard Spring Boot HikariCP properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced `dataSourceClassName` and empty fields with `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and explicit `url`, `username`, and `hikari` settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to use JHipster's custom FixedH2Dialect for better compatibility.
Add Liquibase context configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added `spring.liquibase.contexts: dev, faker` to enable sample data loading.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Configure Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycle.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added `spring.devtools.restart.enabled: true` and excluded static resources from restart.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Enable pretty-printing for JSON responses in development.
Configure detailed logging levels for development debugging.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added `logging.level` entries for ROOT, tech.jhipster, org.hibernate.SQL, and io.github.jhipster.sample set to DEBUG.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate custom JHipster configuration from legacy format to new `jhipster` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced `metrics`, `cache`, and `mail` sections with comprehensive `jhipster` block including cache, cors, security.jwt, mail, and logging settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot properties alongside JHipster specific base-url.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing legacy XHTML mode setting.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Removed `mode: XHTML` and `viewNames: error`, keeping only `cache: false`.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Include additional profiles like api-docs in the active profile list.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `spring.datasource` from `dataSourceClassName`/`serverName` style to `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` with a full JDBC `url` and nested `hikari` properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JPA/Hibernate configuration properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated dialects.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Replaced `spring.jpa.database-platform` and `naming-strategy` with standard `spring.jpa` properties and updated cache factory class references.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Actuator management configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x property structure.
Move cache configuration into the JHipster-specific namespace to match the new application properties structure.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for security, logging, and HTTP caching.
Update server configuration to include graceful shutdown and compression settings supported in newer Spring Boot versions.
Standardize logging level configuration using Spring Boot 2.x `logging.level` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Replaced implicit logging settings with explicit `logging.level.ROOT`, `logging.level.tech.jhipster`, etc.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved mail settings from `spring.mail.baseUrl` (custom) to `spring.mail.host/port` and `jhipster.mail.base-url`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing deprecated XHTML mode setting.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed `spring.thymeleaf.mode: XHTML` and `viewNames`, keeping only `cache: true`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Explicitly disable DevTools in production profile to ensure consistent behavior across environments.
Configure Liquibase contexts for the production profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Replace custom async thread pool configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
Update Hibernate and JPA properties to use Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and new generator mappings.
Replace old swagger properties with JHipster-specific api-docs configuration structure.
Remove deprecated security.basic.enabled and management.security.enabled in favor of Spring Security 5 defaults.
Add explicit server servlet session cookie configuration for security hardening.
Configure application info and ribbon display profiles for Spring Boot 2.x actuator.
Add JHipster specific client application properties and CORS placeholders.
Enable ANSI console output for better logging visibility in Spring Boot 2.x.

src/main/resources/config/liquibase/chan.general_idea: Upgrade Liquibase XML schema definition from version 3.1 to 4.2 to support newer features and syntax.
Add the Liquibase extension namespace to the changelog root element.
Remove database-specific property definitions for 'now' and 'autoIncrement' in favor of standard or driver-specific defaults.
src/main/resources/config/liquibase/chan.human_impl: Removed <property name="now" .../> and added <property name="autoIncrement" value="true"/>

src/main/resources/config/liquibase/chan.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate sequence creation and table support, likely migrating to database-native identity columns or different ID generation strategies.
Rename the user table from T_USER to jhi_user to follow JHipster naming conventions.
Add an explicit 'id' column as the primary key for the user table, replacing the login-based key.
Rename the password column to password_hash to better reflect its content and security implications.
Increase the length of the email column to 191 characters to support longer email addresses and index constraints.
Add an image_url column to the user table to store profile picture URLs.
Increase the length of the lang_key column from 5 to 10 characters to support more complex locale codes.
Add a reset_key column to the user table for password reset functionality.
Add a reset_date column to track when the password reset key was generated.
Remove the default value 'system' from the created_by column, requiring explicit population.
Remove the default value for created_date, likely relying on application logic or database triggers instead.
Rename the authority table from T_AUTHORITY to jhi_authority to follow JHipster naming conventions.
Rename the user authority junction table from T_USER_AUTHORITY to jhi_user_authority.
Update columns in the user authority table to reference user_id and authority_name instead of login and name.
Remove the T_PERSISTENT_TOKEN table, likely migrating to a different session management strategy (e.g., JWT).
Update the primary key constraint on the user authority table to use the new column names.
Update the foreign key constraint in the user authority table to reference the renamed authority table and column.
Update the foreign key constraint in the user authority table to reference the new user_id column in the jhi_user table.
Add a not-null constraint to the password_hash column to ensure data integrity.
Update the data loading file path and table name to match the new schema.
